name: David Farrell
title: AI Consultant & Computer Scientist
bio: Computer scientist with a PhD who spent 10 years as a university lecturer, with a background in game design. Now runs a consultancy with two subcontractors, juggling rapid prototyping engagements, a RAG system for a university, and a major gig as architect for Pearson's AI-first education platform. Early ChatGPT adopter who freelances and teaches people how to use AI applications.
